commands.review_summary:
The PR snapshots source job permissions into cluster plans and lets artifact review use that snapshot when the original generated job file is unavailable.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main depends on re-reading `plan.source_job`, so removing the source job makes permission review unavailable and calibration checks disappear. I did not run the test suite because this review must keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair lane is needed because no concrete patch defect was found and this maintainer-authored draft PR needs normal maintainer handling instead.
